info.description: API Documentation for LinguaLoop E-Learning Platform.
info.title: LinguaLoop API

get.description: Get a list of all academic years including nested semester data

post.description: Add a new academic year to the system

get.description: Generate a template for the next academic year with dates shifted by +1 year. Fails if a draft already exists.
Get detailed information of an academic year by its ID

delete.description: Soft delete an academic year by ID. Fails if the year is active.

put.description: Activate an academic year and set semester ganjil to active. Fails if another year is already active.
Close a semester (if ganjil -> unlocks genap, if genap -> changes year status to Menunggu Kenaikan)
Change the status of ganjil or genap semester

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password to get JWT token

get.description: Get a list of all classes

post.description: Add a single new class to the system
Auto-generate multiple classes alphabetically per level based on existing DB records

get.description: Get detailed information of a class by its ID

put.description: Update existing class capacity or homeroom teacher

delete.description: Soft delete a class by ID

get.description: Get aggregated statistics for admin dashboard including demograhics and recent activities.
Retrieve a list of all majors

put.description: Update an existing major by ID

get.description: Retrieve city detail by ID
Retrieve all districts within a city. Supports optional search by name.
Retrieve district detail by ID
Retrieve all subdistricts/villages within a district. Supports optional search by name.
Search locations by postal code (minimum 3 characters)
Retrieve a list of all provinces. Supports optional search by name.
Retrieve province detail by ID
Retrieve all cities/regencies within a province. Supports optional search by name.
Retrieve subdistrict detail by ID
Retrieve postal codes for a subdistrict
get.summary: Get Postal Codes by Subdistrict ID

get.description: Get a list of all students

post.description: Add a new student to the system and auto-generate user account

get.description: Get detailed information of a student by their ID

delete.description: Soft delete a student by ID

patch.description: Change student status and auto-sync login capabilities

get.description: Get a list of all subjects

post.description: Add a new subject to the system

get.description: Get detailed information of a subject by its ID

delete.description: Soft delete a subject by ID

get.description: Get a list of all teachers

post.description: Add a new teacher to the system and auto-generate user account

get.description: Get detailed information of a teacher by their ID

delete.description: Soft delete a teacher by ID

patch.description: Change teacher status between ACTIVE and INACTIVE

major_code.description: Untuk digabung dalam nama, ex: IPA

class_name.description: Otomatis dibentuk backend, tapi field dipertahankan jika frontend masih mengirim
